title: デビュー戦の後に・迷走

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship shows a strong performance on the
track by unleashing the power of... Soy beans!
Soy beans! SOOOY BEEEAAAAANS!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to enter a "hot" race next, so I set our
sights on the Hopeful Stakes. Time to get swole
on protein in order to seize victory!
